title: crotalaria cornu-ammonis
intro: Crotalaria cornu-ammonis, also known as ammonium fritillaria or horned crotalaria, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Crotalaria cornu-ammonis can be prepared as an herbal decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
